name: rapidfire
description: Dispatcher pattern. User drops a one-line idea; the dispatcher refines it in ≤3 questions, writes a ticket to `.rapidfire/T<NN>-<slug>.md`, then fire-and-forget dispatches to a background subagent. Auto-selects model + agent_type from a 4-bucket complexity heuristic. Pre-dispatch lint catches spec defects (T01-class acceptance/edit conflicts). Auto-dispatches queued tickets when their `depends_on` is satisfied. Lead reviews + commits via /rapidfire commit. Portable across SKILL.md-native hosts (subagent dispatch varies).
